name: tessera-neural-sidecar
description: Neural trust layer for agent systems. Watches agent trajectory, compresses into sparse neural state, emits trusted/abstain decisions. Read-only sidecar — never mutates host memory, tools, or prompts.
author: James Paul Jackson
claimBoundary: The plugin provides local inference and proposals only; the host retains tool, memory-write, prompt, topology, codec, and external API authority.
